title: There’s no easy money in the markets! Embrace the suck!!
text: there is no easy money in the markets if there is no easy money in the markets if you want to be a successful trader you you want to be a successful trader you you want to be a successful trader you need to be willing to put in the work need to be willing to put in the work need to be willing to put in the work the time and the effort you have to the time and the effort you have to the time and the effort you have to become a statistical outlier embrace the become a statistical outlier embrace the become a statistical outlier embrace the suck let's get after it
